transcript.text:
(Look at this beautiful wave)
(Crab meat is cascading down)
(The best rice thief dish in Korea)
(You're No. 1 on our hunt down list from now on)
(Gejang mukbang) It's been so long since I ate it!
(She slurps down gejang non-stop)
(We're sending it to you live)
(Tzuyang eating everything on the table)
(We couldn't stop her...)
(Bangi-dong, Songpa-gu, Seoul)
Hello, everyone
I'm here at Bangi-dong now
for ganjang gejang* *Raw crab marinated in soy sauce
after such a long time
It's been almost over a year since I had it
It feels like ages

The owner of this place is away for today
but they say she worked
only on ganjang gejang for 40 years
(Yangnyeom time) Let's go inside
(It's 'Bonga Jinmi Ganjang Gejang' in Bangi-dong)
Wow, look here
They sell it in three different sizes
Extra large, large, and medium
This extra large one weighs
a little less than twice the medium one
but it's almost double in size
Excuse me, extra large...
how big is a medium sized crab?
For example,
the medium one is about this size
(Extra large one is almost double in size) Large is about this, extra large is this big

It's twice as big, right?
The bigger the crab,
the fuller the crab roe and the meatier it is
(Today's order) Then can I get
2 extra large ganjang gejang
2 extra large yangnyeom gejang
2 large ganjang gejang
2 large yangnyeom gejang
3 medium gangjang gejang
(Her eyes wide open) and
3 medium yangnyeom gejang?
2, 2, 2, 2, 3, 3
(A set menu to try other marinated seafood!) and make one of them a set menu, please
One set menu? Alright
- Thank you - Thank you
(Ganjang gejang, the notorious rice thief that leaves nothing behind)

(Yangnyeom gejang that teases you with the spice)
(With this gejang duo, you'll never fail to finish your meal!)
(Here comes the gejang)
(A huge big pile of crabs) Thank you
Look, they're medium on this side
and these are large, these extra large
Thank you
Wow, I guess this is an extra large
Look how big it is!
(You can tell the difference by glancing at them) It isn't small, but this one is really big
I've missed gejang for so long
(Extra large ones are so big that they cut them twice) Extra large ones are cut into 4 pieces, while these are cut into 2 pieces
(First cleanse the palate with Coke)
Thank you for the meal
Where should I start? The original ganjang gejang, right?
Latex gloves on!

They're the best when eating gejang
Wow, half of it is the crab roe
Half roe, half meat
(It looks like liquid gold oozing out...!) Look at the tomalley! It's insane
(Mesmerized)
Wow, the meat is so sweet
It's sweet
and it doesn't smell that fishy
As for me, gejang shouldn't be
too salty
The seasoning is...
not too salty, it hits the spot
Crack this open
and scrape off the meat
Honestly, the meat is too sweet
What...?

What are those?
(They're on the house) You're giving them to me for free?
Thank you!
(Various marinated seafood for free) Abalone, shrimp, and salmon
Is this marinated conch?
Wow, looks delicious
(The black ones were too big!) White latex gloves on!
(Satisfied) This is good!
Let's dig in extra large ones
These must be extra large
(It fills her hand...) This is definitely big
(The extra large cascade of gejang...!) Look at the tomalley... It's crazy!
(Eyes shut)
It really
makes you happy
Honestly, the meat is

very chunky and...
It's absolutely gorgeous
I'm not lying
(The ultimate flavor) It will make you lick everything
It's not salty at all!
Scrape all the meat
Scrape the leg, too!
Thank you haha
(Blue crab stew on the house) It's blue crab stew!
How can I not eat this?
It's so full
(Even the legs are full with meat) There's nothing to throw away
It's insane
Wow, this blue crab stew is
(The blue crab is so full of meat) awesome!
What is it? There's meat in the blue crab?

(She's almost in tears hehehe) It's so tasty, insane
(Thumbs up)
No, I have to eat yangnyeom gejang now
This is yangnyeom
It's not the whole crab
Just half of it
(It doesn't fit into one hand...) Initially, it is this big
This is huge!
(It's heavenly)
The sauce is quite spicy
There's a kick to it
but really good!
Open up the leg
I can't miss this, either
(Full of meat)
Wow, the pincer is enormous!

Let's eat a medium one
Medium ones are definitely
smaller compared to large ones
It's about this big
(Medium ones aren't small for sure) About the regular gejang crab size
Maybe it tastes a bit different?
It's good!
No need to open up a leg to get the meat, just chew it out
(Addicted to gejang despite of the spice) Yangnyeom gejang is quite spicy...
but so good!
Finally it's time to eat
rice
(Gejang is well known as a rice thief)
(Full of crab roe) It's fully packed!
(The meat is bursting out...!)
Actually...

(Not crap) I'm exceptional at crab meat scraping
(This is perfect for mixing with rice) There's flying fish roe, fantastic
Look at this crab shell! It's so big!
(The golden meat is falling onto the rice)
(If there's El Dorado on earth, this must be it)
No, first
put it on the white rice and eat them together
Wow
It's unworldly
It's not salty! How's that possible?
Let's eat the blue crab in the stew
(Thumbs up)
The blue crab is so sweet
Even the crab in stew is on another level
Going for the marinated shrimp
The meat is...

(Her thumbs are working hard today)
Marinated abalone!
Wow
(She's processing it a bit late) The shrimp is exquisite!
(Approved) This place is legit!
Leg!
(It's yangnyeom time) Moving onto the yangnyeom now
(Yangnyeom gejang, an accomplice of the rice thief)
Use your finger like this
(and get every piece of crab tomalley, the ultimate delicacy)
(Yangnyeom gejang rice is nothing short of ganjang gejang rice)
(999999th thumbs up today)
When you mix rice with gejang,
you must add sesame oil
(Sesame oil is the cherry on top...!)
Excuse me

Can I get one soybean paste stew?
I'm back to crab surgery!
Wow
Medium one!
(Push it all out)
(and drop it)
(It really calls for rice as a rice thief should) I'll have another bowl of rice with gejang
Thank you so much!
(Soy bean paste stew, the rice's bestie, is ready) The stew smells insane
Mix them
(The rice thief deserves life in prison...)
Wrap it with seaweed
and all in one!
(I'll fly up in the sky...)
(The rich flavor of the stew calls for a drink) It'd be perfect with soju!
I need this first

(This gejang place makes wonderful stew, too)
It's extra large, no doubt about it
(Very big) It's unbelievably huge!
Extra large ones have extra large tomalley
(It's killing me...)
Crack open a leg in half like this
and eat them, it's more comfortable
Now that I think about it
I eat 20 crabs on average
(Her stomach doesn't rumble 'cause they're so big) Extra large ones are so big
that it feels like I'm eating 18, 20 crabs
(Amazing!)
Extra large one and
2 medium ones are about the same size
(Then, it is about the same amount of 20 crabs)
(Crunch, crunch, crunch)

If something gets stuck in my teeth,
I'll be in big trouble!
but I can't stop eating it!
(It's too good not to have it)
I'll make some all meat gejang
(Crab meat is coming out endlessly!)
Unbelievable!
(Squeezing out every bit of crab meat)
(and tomalley inside crab shells)
(Can't imagine how pricey it'd be, the meat is all in there) How much do you think it'd cost?
It's nuts
First I'll have a spoonful of it
Beautiful...!
(You have to mix it with rice)
Thank you
(and raw egg yolk and some seaweed)

(Only then you get the ultimate gejang rice)
It's really...
(King of flavors!) This richness is incomparable
The rest of the rice is going into
(Here comes a crab shell) this crab shell and I'll mix everything in
(Everyone knows crab shell rice is amazing) Mix rice in it
(This is what I'm talking about) This is how you eat gejang
Ganjang gejang is all gone
Next up, yangnyeom gejang!
(Refilled the stew)
Yangnyeom gejang
Here it goes
(Gejang and rice are meant for each other)
(In the middle of scraping the crab meat)
Look at this shell
It's as big as my face

Maybe it's an overstatement
(No, it's not) But look at it! It's enormous!
The flying fish roe in it look like crab roe
(Off, off)
(Yangnyeom gejang rice looks much tastier)
It looks so much better than ganjang gejang rice
With a bit of sesame oil, it gets perfect
(It was more than 'a bit'...)
Wow, it's very flavorful...
Awesome!
(Chilsung Cider)
They say places where they serve Coca-Cola and Chilsung Cider
like this
(If they serve you glass bottled soda, they make good foods hehe) have great food
(Refilled the stew) Thank you
She's smaller than me

(You're full of mystery) I can't understand how she can put all that in
Wow, blue crab stew
I should come back here for blue crab stew
(Have a spoonful of rice and a spoonful of stew, it goes on forever)
Finished everything!
(Then why...?) But
(Little bit of rice vanishes with the blue crab stew)
(I praise you for your tenacity...)
(Unbelievable) (I praise you for your tenacity...)
(The most fascinating thing is...) Coke!
(The most fascinating thing is...) 6 bottles of soda...
There was never a person
who ate all of it with that much of soda
(She's not just a customer) It's as good as serving customers in a group
About 14 people, to be exact
Gejang was very tasty, not salty at all

(Felt like they were specialized in blue crab stew) The stew was just... wonderful
I truly enjoyed it so much!
Thank you
Thank you
I had a great meal as usual!
